---
title: "The Rt. Rev. John Wordsworth"
---

## The Rt. Rev. John Wordsworth

**Dates:** (1843-1911)

### Description

Bishop of Salisbury

### Biography

Brother of Elizabeth Wordsworth, he married first (1870), Susan Esther Coxe (daughter of the Rev. Henry Coxe), with whom he had two children, and, secondly (1896), Mary Anne Frances William, and had four sons and two daughters.

### Letters

- Letter from January 2, 1897
- Letter from June 22  [1894?]
- Letter from July 4th 1889

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
